summary: Iteration 34 - P1/P2 Features Testing Complete. All features verified working: 1) Off-canvas NotificationSheet opens when bell icon clicked, 2) WebSocket disconnection banner shows 'Connection lost' with Reconnect button, 3) Top Performers card on Admin Analytics page with 'Active traders only' checkbox, 4) Top performers API endpoint returns performer data with exclude_non_traders filter, 5) Backend scheduler starts successfully for missed trade notifications (runs at 11 PM UTC).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1/P2 features verified working. NotificationSheet component uses Sheet from shadcn/ui with data-testid='notification-sheet'. WebSocket connection status shown in footer with 'Live updates active' or 'Disconnected - Click reconnect'. Top Performers card has 'Active traders only' checkbox that filters by traders who traded in last 30 days.

notification_sheet.details: Off-canvas NotificationSheet opens when bell icon (data-testid='notification-bell') is clicked. Shows 'Notifications' header, notification list, and connection status footer.

websocket_disconnection_banner.details: When WebSocket is disconnected, shows 'Connection lost' banner with red WifiOff icon and 'Reconnect' button. Footer shows 'Disconnected - Click reconnect'.

top_performers_card.details: Top Performers card visible on Team Analytics page with trophy icon. Shows 'Active traders only' checkbox (checked by default). When checked, filters to show only traders who traded in last 30 days.

top_performers_api.details: GET /api/admin/top-performers endpoint returns performer data with fields: id, full_name, email, total_profit, total_trades, avg_profit_per_trade, rank. Supports exclude_non_traders and limit parameters.

missed_trade_scheduler.details: APScheduler configured to run check_missed_trades at 11 PM UTC daily. Scheduler startup logged in backend logs. Sends email notifications to members who missed today's trade.

api_tests.GET /api/admin/top-performers: PASS - Returns performer list with ranking
api_tests.GET /api/admin/top-performers?exclude_no: PASS - Filters to active traders only

ui_tests.notification_sheet_content: PASS - Shows header, notifications, connection status

features: Reconnect button calls reconnect() from WebSocketContext
Footer shows 'Live updates active' or 'Disconnected - Click reconnect'
Checkbox toggles filter and reloads data
Runs at 11 PM UTC via CronTrigger(hour=23, minute=0)
Sends email to members who didn't trade today
Filters by traders who traded in last 30 days
Returns ranked list with profit stats
